productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Women Washed Blue Capris
description: Composition Blue denim capris made of 98% cotton and 2% elastane with a faded look, has two side pockets and a patch pocket above the right one, two large back pockets, comfortable waist with loops, zipper fly, stitch detailing and reinforced stitch detailing on the crotch area, mock torn stitches on the thighs Fitting Slim Wash care Wash and dry separately Wash inside out in mild detergent Do not bleach Dry under shade Take edgy dressing to the next level in these slim capris from united colors of benetton. Perfect for casual outings with friends, this denim capris looks great with tank t-shirts and high ankle sneakers. Model statistics The model wears trousers of length 37" Height-5'7”, Waist – 26”, Hips – 36”
